description: NyquistAI provides life sciences data and AI products focused on regulatory, clinical, safety, and market intelligence. Its public site highlights medical device and pharma intelligence platforms plus an MCP server for live FDA device intelligence.
summary: NyquistAI exposes a public remote MCP server at `https://mcp.nyquistai.com/agent/mcp`, authenticated via NyquistAI account OAuth 2.0; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `nyquistai.com`.
